creator: ashafer@badland.io
text:
I don't think this proposed description really describes nvidia-drm itself at all, maybe something more like:

"FreeBSD port of Linux's nvidia-drm.ko Kernel module.

nvidia-drm.ko provides support for the DRM graphics subsystem, which can then be used by userspace applications. This is primarily useful for PRIME render offload and Wayland compositors."
